text: فيني أجي بكرا، إذا ما صار شي.
en: I can come tomorrow, if nothing comes up.
I can help you after noon.

text: مش فيني أكون بمكانين بنفس الوقت.
en: I can't be in two places at the same time.

text: بدي إحكي معك عن شي مهم.
en: I want to talk to you about something important.

text: كان بدي أجي، بس ما قدرت.
en: I was going to come, but I couldn't.
I'm planning to travel next week.
I have to go now, you'll be late.
We're supposed to be there at nine.

text: مو لازم تيجي إذا مش فيك.
en: You don't have to come if you're not up for it.
If I could, I would have traveled with you.
